task.title: Architecture manifest and Mermaid view generator
task.summary: Add canonical system architecture graph support with component and flow docs, then generate agent-readable and Mermaid architecture views from it.

goal.outcome: System architecture is represented as a structured canonical graph with component and flow detail docs and generated visual/read views.
acceptance: `system/architecture.json` owns component nodes and information-flow edges.
Rebuild generates a Mermaid architecture view and agent-readable system architecture view.
Graph validation detects missing component/flow docs or orphan docs.
non_goals: Implement status panel click interactions in this task.
Make Mermaid the source of truth.

delta.desired: Structured graph truth plus generated architecture views.
delta.current: System architecture is mostly prose; generated graph state is not a first-class architecture source.
delta.closure: Architecture graph and Mermaid generation work with validation.

acceptance_matrix.criterion: `system/architecture.json` owns component nodes and information-flow edges.
Rebuild generates a Mermaid architecture view and agent-readable system architecture view.
Graph validation detects missing component/flow docs or orphan docs.

non_goals: Implement status panel click interactions in this task.
Make Mermaid the source of truth.
